scope: PART2 §6.7~6.8 Agent Teams + AI Investing 상세 구현 검증 (vs AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC, AI_INVESTING_SPEC)

mismatches.detail: PART2='D2.0-03 §1.4, D2.0-05 §7.3', SOT='D2.0-03 §1.4, D2.0-05 §7.3 고정3'. SOT has suffix '고정3' which PART2 omits. Minor omission but affects traceability.

PART2 states Lead Agent uses 'Sonnet' but AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §9.1 V1 에이전트 구성 says Lead runs I-5 with context of ORANGE CORE. LLM assignment is Sonnet in PART2 table but the SOT does not explicitly assign 'Sonnet' to the Lead in the V1 table (it specifies the LLM choice through config). Minor inconsistency in LLM labeling specificity.

match_details.detail: SOT states '최대 2단계 (Lead → Sub) — config 제한. LOCK-AT-004 절대상한=3단계'. Exact match.
SOT §2.3.0 confirms V1 uses In-Memory Queue, V2 upgrades to Redis/Kafka.
Exact match. Root ref: D2.0-02 §2.2 S3.

match_details.fact: LOCK-AT-008: P2 Trading 기본 OFF, 세션별 승인
LOCK-AT-009: 대화 턴 상한 P0=5, P1=10, P2=20
LOCK-AT-010: TEE 최대 반복 P0=3, P1=5, P2=10
LOCK-AT-011: 비용 상한 초과 자동 차단
LOCK-AT-015: Lead Agent 직접 실행 금지
LOCK-AT-017: 노코드 빌더 n8n + Flowise 듀얼
LOCK-AT-013: 위임 시 OWNER 권한 실행

match_details.detail: SOT lists exactly 17 LOCK-AT items (001~017). PART2 also states 17건. Match.

missing.sot_fact: V1/V2 통신 방식 구분 (LOCK): V1=Direct Call (In-Memory), V2+=MessageBus (Redis/Kafka)
missing.detail: PART2 L2640 states 'MessageBus: In-Memory Queue' for V1 but does not explicitly mention the V2 upgrade path to Redis/Kafka in the §6.7 table. However V2 §7.3 mentions MessageBus decision.

missing.sot_fact: Agent Lifecycle 5-state: IDLE → ASSIGNED → EXECUTING → REPORTING → TERMINATED (LOCK)
missing.detail: PART2 §6.7 does not include the Agent Lifecycle 5-state LOCK definition. This is a governance-level specification missing from the implementation guide.

check_details.sot_fact: Lead Agent 역할: 계획/분배/검증만 수행, 직접 실행 금지 (LOCK)
Sub-Agent ↔ BLUE NODE 매핑: Research=P0, Dev=P0, Quant=P1, Content=P1, Trading=P2
check_details.detail: PART2 L2648-2661 has agent type table with domain/priority mappings.

check_details.sot_fact: LOCK 메시지 포맷 필드: msg_id, from_agent, to_agent, msg_type, payload, timestamp, trace_id, hmac_signature
check_details.detail: PART2 mentions HMAC requirement (LOCK-AT-012) but does not list the full message schema fields.

check_details.sot_fact: 위임 체인 규칙 LOCK: max_depth=3, 순환 금지, OWNER 권한 유지
check_details.detail: PART2 LOCK-AT-004 and LOCK-AT-013 cover max_depth and OWNER privilege.

check_details.sot_fact: V2 추가 에이전트: Quant, Content, Trading, Productivity, Critic, SDAR
check_details.detail: PART2 L2652-2661 lists all 6 V2 additional agents.

check_details.sot_fact: 협업 패턴: Sequential, Parallel, Debate, Supervisor, Handoff (V1: Sequential+Parallel only)
check_details.detail: PART2 L2638 states 'Sequential, Parallel만' for V1.

check_details.sot_fact: DEFER-AT-003: Agent Marketplace 등록 기준 미정의
Trading Agent P2 도메인 Opus LLM 사용
check_details.detail: PART2 L2658 states Trading Agent uses Opus.

check_details.sot_fact: Agent 이벤트 시스템: agent.task.assigned, agent.task.completed, agent.task.failed
check_details.detail: PART2 §6.11 mentions 'agent.*' events in registry but does not enumerate specific agent event types.

findings.description: LOCK-AT 근거 참조에서 SOT의 '고정N' 접미사가 PART2에서 누락
findings.evidence: SOT LOCK-AT-003='D2.0-05 §7.3 고정3', PART2='D2.0-05 §7.3'. 추적성 약간 저하.
AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §2.4.1 정의된 필수 생명주기 상태가 PART2 구현 가이드에 미포함.

findings.description: Agent 메시지 포맷 상세 필드(msg_id, from_agent, to_agent 등)가 PART2에 미기재
findings.evidence: AGENT_TEAMS_SPEC §2.3.1의 LOCK 메시지 스키마 8개 필드가 PART2에서 HMAC만 언급.
